known_bug: Minutes validation rejects negative; offset calc uses subtraction instead of addition
fix_description: Changed validation to allow -59..+59; but offset calculation `minutesOffset = hoursInMinutes - minutesOffset` is wrong for negative minutes
notes: Fails because subtraction of negative minutes adds them to negative hours, resulting in incorrect total

known_bug: Minutes validation rejects negative; offset calc uses subtraction instead of addition
fix_description: Changed validation to allow -59..+59; uses `minutesOffset = hoursInMinutes - Math.abs(minutesOffset)` for negative hours
notes: Correctly handles the offset calculation for negative minutes
